chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 2150 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders on CMA No.10024/2023 (Urgency): 10.07.2023: Mr. Taha Kamal Alam, Advocate for the Plaintiff. Mr. Muhammad Hassan Arif, Advocate for the Defendant No.3............. The Plaintiff has filed this application seeking urgency with regard to CMA No.7360/2023 for withdrawal of application under Order IX Rule 9 CPC recalling the order dated 31.01.2023 whereby essentially this suit was dismissed. The application is supported by an affidavit of Iqbal Ismail who is duly authorized by the Board of Directors (available at page No.17 of the suit file). In view of the above the application for urgent hearing is granted and the application under Order IX Rule 9 CPC being CMA No.7360/2023 is disposed of as withdrawn. Consequentially as per the Nazir’s Report dated 17.02.2023 the amount of US$86,498.61 including the profit accrued thereon may be returned to Defendant No.3 after proper verification and identification. J U D G E
